settings.text:
Shipping Information

We want your order to arrive as quickly as possible. Here’s everything you need to know about our shipping process.

Processing Time

Orders are processed within 1–3 business days after payment is confirmed. You’ll receive an email with your tracking number once your order has shipped.

Shipping Times

  • Standard Shipping (US): 5–8 business days
  • Express Shipping (US): 2–3 business days
  • International: 10–20 business days depending on destination

Shipping Rates

  • Free standard shipping on all US orders over $50
  • Standard US shipping: $5.99
  • Express US shipping: $14.99
  • International shipping rates calculated at checkout

Order Tracking

Once your order ships, you’ll receive a tracking number via email. You can use it to track your package directly on the carrier’s website.

Questions?

If you have any questions about your shipment, please contact our support team and we’ll be happy to help.
